name: Hideo Kojima

acts.description: Systematic hypersexualization of female characters in games (Quiet in MGSV, etc.) combined with dismissive 'just understand it later' justification

behavior_summary: Consistent pattern of designing female characters in ways that prioritize objectification. Defended Quiet's costume by saying players would 'feel ashamed' once they understood — they didn't.

art.summary: Visionary auteur game designer who redefined what interactive narrative could be. Genuinely irreplaceable creative voice.

verdict.blurb: Possibly the most important creative figure in video game history who keeps insisting women characters who breathe through their skin need to be half-naked. The games are extraordinary. This part is not.
